creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm biased. GEOM correctly classifies md(4) as disks. Why should we prevent someone from creating an installation out of these devices? I can think of several reasons why it might be helpful to be able to perform an installation to md(4) devices. Removing or filtering-out these devices may seem like it's preventing a silly situation but I tend to believe it prevents clever applications.
